summary: Iteration 52: Complete testing of Enhanced Bank Reconciliation and Expanded Keyboard Shortcuts features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed for GET /api/bank-statements/{id}/unmatched and POST /api/bank-statements/{id}/manual-match endpoints. Frontend: All features verified - Unmatched tab with suggestions showing confidence tiers (exact/probable/possible), Link buttons for manual matching, Tolerance dropdown (SAR 1/5/10/50), Date Range dropdown (1/2/3/5/7 days), and 31 keyboard shortcuts including single-key (B/F/G/J/M/Q), Ctrl+Shift (R/I/D/T), and Alt combos (P/C/V).

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. These are display:contents wrapper issues from dynamic rendering but don't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/bank-statements/{id}/unmatched endpoint properly implemented at line 642-728 in bank_statements.py - returns unmatched array with index, date, amount, type, description, category, beneficiary, and suggestions array with type, id, amount, date, desc, score, tier, amt_diff

POST /api/bank-statements/{id}/manual-match endpoint properly implemented at line 735-795 - validates txn_index, match_type (sale/expense/supplier_payment), match_id, prevents duplicate matches, looks up system records and creates auto_matches entry with status='manual'
Confidence tier calculation correct: exact>=90, probable>=65, possible<65 based on date difference and amount difference scoring
useKeyboardShortcuts.js contains 31 shortcuts with proper ctrl/shift/alt detection and navigation/event dispatch
DashboardLayout.jsx single-key shortcuts (B/F/G/J/M/Q) at line 216-227 working correctly
ShortcutHelpDialog.jsx properly groups shortcuts into navigation (Ctrl+Number), page navigation (Ctrl+Shift), more pages (Alt+Key), and actions
seed_data_creation: None - used existing bank statement (alinma.xls 01/05/2025-31/05/2025) with 352 unmatched transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Bank Reconciliation fully tested. Statement selector at data-testid='stmt-select'. Unmatched tab at data-testid='unmatched-tab'. Tolerance dropdown at data-testid='tolerance-select' with SAR 1/5/10/50 options. Date range dropdown at data-testid='daterange-select' with 1/2/3/5/7 days options. Unmatched list at data-testid='unmatched-list' with rows at data-testid='unmatched-row-{idx}'. Link buttons at data-testid='link-btn-{txn_idx}-{suggestion_idx}'. Keyboard shortcuts: single-key (D/S/E/I/R/A/V/T/L/W/C/K/H/O/B/F/G/J/M/Q), Ctrl+Shift combos (P/K/N/S/R/I/D/T), Alt combos (P/C/V/S/L/M). Shortcuts modal opens via data-testid='shortcuts-btn' in sidebar or '?' key. Console has minor hydration warnings for <span> in <tbody> which don't affect functionality.

bank_reconciliation_unmatched_tab.unmatched_row_structure: PASS - Shows date, type badge (credit/debit), category, description, amount
bank_reconciliation_unmatched_tab.suggestions_display: PASS - 'SUGGESTED MATCHES' section with Sale/Expense/Supplier badges
bank_reconciliation_unmatched_tab.confidence_tiers: PASS - Shows 'exact', 'probable', 'possible' tier badges with score %
bank_reconciliation_unmatched_tab.amount_difference: PASS - Shows 'diff: SAR X.XX' for each suggestion
bank_reconciliation_unmatched_tab.link_button: PASS - data-testid='link-btn-{idx}-{si}' button available for manual linking

bank_reconciliation_controls.tolerance_options: PASS - SAR 1, SAR 5, SAR 10, SAR 50 all available
bank_reconciliation_controls.daterange_options: PASS - 1 day, 2 days, 3 days, 5 days, 7 days all available

backend_api_tests.GET /api/bank-statements: PASS - Returns list with id, file_name, bank_name, period
backend_api_tests.unmatched_txn_structure: PASS - Contains index, date, amount, type, description, suggestions
backend_api_tests.suggestion_structure: PASS - Contains type, id, amount, date, desc, score, tier, amt_diff
